backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining user profiles, badges, levels, XP, and leaderboard logic for an AI English Teacher app, with role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization module and persistent state using Map and List.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three login-page features (functional Internet Identity button, auto profile creation on first login, and responsive layout) to their implementation file and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of five frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's key hooks and pages.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'AI English Teacher' and mounting the app via a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, login, dashboard, call, practice, and admin pages, wrapping protected routes in AuthGuard and AdminGuard components.
frontend/src/components/BadgeUnlockNotif: Animated toast-style notification component that displays a badge unlock event with CSS confetti, auto-dismisses after 5 seconds, and includes a manual close button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing the app name, current year, and a branded link to caffeine.ai with a UTM-tagged URL derived from the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, showing authenticated nav links (Dashboard, AI Call, Practice, and optionally Admin) or a Sign In button based on Internet Identity auth state and user role.
frontend/src/components/XPCounter.tsx: Transient floating XP gain indicator that renders a styled pill with a trophy icon and XP amount, auto-hiding after 2.5 seconds via a CSS pop animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, admin user listing, achievements, and leaderboard data using the actor from useActor.
React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide continuous speech recognition with transcript state, start/stop controls, error handling, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: React hook wrapping the Web Speech Synthesis API to speak text using a preferred English voice, with speaking state, cancellation support, and graceful fallbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines a deep-purple dark theme via CSS custom properties, and declares reusable keyframe animations and utility classes for the app's UI.
frontend/src/lib/speechAnalysis.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for speech analysis results and mistakes, and provides a mock `analyzeSpeech` function that returns pre-defined feedback (grammar corrections, XP, encouragement) based on practice mode.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for viewing all users, weekly session analytics (bar chart), and saving practice scripts per mode, using mock data alongside real user data from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CallScreen.tsx: Voice call practice screen that manages call state, speech recognition, AI speech synthesis, and speech analysis, supporting multiple practice modes (daily, interview, group, RRB/SSC) with XP and badge rewards.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard displaying XP, streak, level progress, badges, and a leaderboard, with navigation to practice modes and a sign-out option using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing app features, testimonials, and stats with a hero section, feature cards, and call-to-action buttons linking to sign-up or the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that handles Internet Identity authentication, shows a loading spinner during initialization, and presents a profile setup form (name/email) for first-time users before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PracticeModesPage.tsx: Page displaying four practice mode cards (Daily Conversation, Interview, Group Discussion, RRB/SSC) with descriptions and topic lists, allowing users to navigate to the call page with a selected mode.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom app colors (deep-purple, violet-primary, pink-accent, cyan-secondary), OKLCH CSS variable-based semantic colors, custom keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the 'AI English Teacher' full-stack PWA architecture, tech stack (Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind, MongoDB, OpenAI, Web Speech API), existing features, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
